purpose: Isolated co-admin wrapper: deploys + owns its OWN fresh LocationLPFactory so the Bankr agent wallet can create + seed/inject gated location pools WITHOUT any reach into the live factory.
bankrOperatorProvenance: founder-provided in chat 2026-07-15; 210 trade goods already sent to it; checksum-valid; FOUNDER CONFIRMED in chat 2026-07-15, verbatim: 'this is BNKR address we give authorization to'
operatorNote: filled with the deployed BankrLPOperator address post-deploy (by deploy-bankr-operator.cjs)
bankrOperatorAuthorizedNote: set true only after --set-operator runs (Ethics N1: authorize Bankr ONLY after deploy confirmed on-chain + dust dry-run passes)
notes: impl / gameSigner / owner verified against deploy/location-lp-deployed.json (same values the live factory uses).
Deploy DRY-first via deploy-bankr-operator.cjs (node + agent wallet, never HTML). --live --mainnet required to broadcast.
Ethics N3 dust dry-run: after deploy, OWNER (not Bankr) createPool + seedPool a throwaway dust pair; confirm reserves set + wrapper nets to 0; THEN --set-operator.
